title: Associate Software QA Engineer
description:
At First Advantage (Nasdaq: FA), people are at the heart of everything we do. From our customers and partners to our greatest advantage — our team members. Operating with empathy and compassion, First Advantage fosters a global inclusive workforce devoted to the diverse voices that make up our talent and products. Our team members empower each other to be their authentic selves and treat all with respect, integrity, and fairness.
   

  

 Say hello to a rewarding career and come join a leading provider of mission\\-critical background screening solutions to some of the most recognized Fortune 100 and Global 500 brands.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our dynamic, cross\\-functional team. You’ll build and optimize AI\\-driven solutions and data pipelines, working with modern cloud and data technologies to deliver impactful results.
   

  

**What We Do:**
 We are on the frontline of recruitment enabling organizations to Hire Smarter. Onboard Faster™ First Advantage is an HR Tech company delivering innovative solutions and insights to enable our clients to manage risk and hire the best talent. Leveraging an advanced technology platform, First Advantage builds fully scalable, configurable screening programs that meet the unique needs of over 33,000 clients. Headquartered in Atlanta, GA and with an internationally distributed workforce spanning 19 countries with about 5,500 employees, First Advantage performs over 93 million screens in over 200 countries and territories annually.
   

  

**Who You Are:**
 You are self\\-motivated and ready to “roll up your sleeves." While you are an independent contributor, you are also collaborative. You can spearhead a project and see it through from start to completion.
   

  

 As a team player, you navigate cross\\-functional teams and work well with team members in other business units and departments toward a common goal.
   

  

 An Innovator — you see gaps in current processes or workflows as an opportunity to improve and try something new.
   

  

 A lifelong learner and always seeking out opportunities to learn and upskill, you understand the importance of thorough and secure screenings and are interested in the Human Capital sector and the confluence of people, process, and technology.
   

  

**About Role:**
 First Advantage is a global leader in background screening and identity solutions, supporting more than 30,000
   

  

 customers across 200\\+ countries and territories. Our technology helps organizations make safer hiring
   

  

 decisions and onboard talent confidently.
   

  

 India is one of First Advantage’s largest hubs, home to key engineering, product, and operations teams that
   

  

 play a critical role in shaping our global platforms. Our teams here are shaping high\\-volume, cloud\\-native
   

  

 platforms that support millions of applicants globally. As part of our continued expansion, including our 2024
   

  

 acquisition of Sterling, we are scaling our product, engineering, and quality capabilities to deliver the next
   

  

 generation of HR technology solutions. Joining First Advantage means becoming part of an innovative global organization where collaboration, modern engineering practices, and customer impact guide everything we do.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Manual \\& Exploratory Testing
* Execute manual test cases for UI, API, and end\\-to\\-end user workflows.
* Perform exploratory testing to uncover edge cases and user\\-impacting defects.
* Document clear, reproducible bug reports and collaborate with developers to resolve issues.
* Validate business requirements and user acceptance criteria through hands\\-on testing.


**Automation Engineering**
* Learn to build automated tests for UI, API, and integration layers.
* Contribute to reusable automation scripts and frameworks maintained in GitHub.
* Assist in validating distributed systems and API interactions with guidance from senior engineers.


**Quality Ownership**
* 
* Work closely with developers and product partners to understand story details and test requirements.
* Help integrate automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines.
* Support both manual and automated regression cycles.


**Collaboration \\& Continuous Improvement**
* Participate in code reviews, GitHub workflows, and team automation practices.
* Engage in team learning sessions and internal quality improvement initiatives.


**What You Bring**
**Technical Foundations**
* Basic programming knowledge (JavaScript/TypeScript preferred, or similar).
* Understanding of software testing concepts across UI, API, and integration.
* Exposure to automation tools (WebdriverIO, Playwright, Selenium, etc.) through projects or


 coursework is a plus.
   

  

**Manual Testing Skills**
* Familiarity with writing test cases, test plans, and defect documentation.
* Understanding of functional testing, regression testing, and user\\-flow validation from academic or internship experience.


**Tooling \\& Engineering Basics**
* Familiarity with Git and version control workflows.
* Basic understanding of REST APIs and modern web technologies (HTML, CSS, DOM).
* Awareness of CI/CD principles is beneficial.


**Ways of Working**
* Strong communication skills and willingness to learn.
* Attention to detail and a passion for delivering quality.
* Curiosity, adaptability, and eagerness to expand testing skills.


**Nice to Have (Not Required)**
* Exposure to SQL basics.
* Awareness of performance or accessibility testing concepts.
* Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS, Azure) through university or personal projects.


**Why First Advantage is Your Next Big Career Move**
 First Advantage is going through a technology transformation! We are looking for experts who are excited to work with advanced technologies and provide best\\-in\\-class user experiences, drive the development and deployment of scalable solutions, and smoothly guide our agile teams and clients through meaningful changes as we continue to expand our impact.
   

  

**What Are You Waiting For? Apply Today!**
 You have learned a little about us today – we want to learn about you! If you think this position and our company are a great fit for your areas of interest and expertise, tell us about you by applying now!
   

  

**EMPLOYEE BENEFITS – India Region:**
 Most of the roles are enabled with the ability to work remotely with occasional business travel.
 **Hybrid working model**
 Comprehensive employee
 **Leave policy**
 Career progressions through I
 **nternal job opportunities** 
 and

 programs
   

  

**Career Development** 
 : Mentoring Program, People Management Program, cross\\-functions training, soft skills training.
   

  

 Continuous learning and development opportunities.

 opportunities mobilized through e\\-learning platforms
   

  

 Training and Certification

**Medical Insurance coverage** 
 for employees and parental insurance benefits available. Calendarized Employee Wellness programs
   

  

 Quarterly

 program to recognize exemplary performance
   

  

 Other

title: Intern
description:
**Build the Future of Data, Analytics, and AI with Teradata**
 Are you driven by the challenge of shaping the future of database technologies, analytics, and AI—whether in the cloud, on\\-premises, or hybrid environments? At Teradata, we invite you to be part of a visionary team that’s redefining the landscape of intelligent data platforms.

 **students from premium colleges** 
 for internships, who are passionate about building world\\-class products and solving complex data and analytics challenges in our
 **India Development and Excellence Centre** 
 and contribute to innovations that empower global enterprises.
   

  

**Analytics and AI Team**
 Our Analytics and AI team leads the charge in delivering next\\-generation capabilities within Teradata’s unified data platform. We’re pioneering technologies such as:
   

  

* Enterprise\\-grade databases for RAG\\-based AI applications and intelligent agents
* In\\-database analytics functions and BYOM (Bring Your Own Model) deployment
* SQL\\-based generative AI and Agentic AI systems that combine reasoning, retrieval, and orchestration at scale


 We are building intelligent, production\\-ready analytics that allow users to move effortlessly between traditional data processing and advanced AI workflows—all within the trusted, governed environment of
 **Teradata VantageCloud** 
 .
   

  

 At Teradata, we don’t just manage data—we unlock its full potential through the power of AI and ML. As an intern, you’ll help design, build, and deploy transformative software solutions that are central to our strategic vision and global impact.
   

  

**Data Platform \\& Query Optimization Team**
 Our Core Database Engineering team is focused on developing
 **cloud\\-native database features** 
 that support distributed query processing, autoscaling, and high availability. We’re building systems that are:
   

  

* Highly performant, secure, and reliable for large\\-scale analytical workloads
* Powered by elastic compute clusters for high concurrency and scalability
* Designed with advanced storage and retrieval mechanisms across diverse data sources
* Enterprise\\-grade databases for RAG\\-based AI applications and intelligent agents


 The
 **Query Optimizer Team** 
 is the brain behind efficient data access. From cost\\-based plan selection and join reordering to adaptive execution and cardinality estimation, we fine\\-tune every aspect of query planning to ensure optimal performance at scale. If you’re passionate about performance, this is where the magic happens.
   

  

**AI\\-Powered Test Automation**
 As we deliver AI to our customers, we also harness its power internally to enhance our development lifecycle. Our
 **AI\\-based test automation** 
 initiatives focus on:
   

  

* Building autonomous and agentic systems that analyze billions of test events
* Identifying root causes of failures and accelerating release decisions
* Experimenting with LLMs, vector stores, and multi\\-agent orchestration frameworks to evolve testing from passive verification to proactive, self\\-healing quality assurance


**Why Teradata?**
 At Teradata, you’ll work with some of the brightest minds in the industry, tackle meaningful challenges, and help shape the future of data and AI. Whether you're passionate about analytics, cloud engineering, AI systems, or performance optimization—
 **there’s a place for you here** 
 .
   

  

**Why We Think You’ll Love Teradata**
 We prioritize a people\\-first culture because we know our people are at the very heart of our success. We embrace a flexible work model because we trust our people to make decisions about how, when, and where they work. We focus on well\\-being because we care about our people and their ability to thrive both personally and professionally. We are an anti\\-racist company because our dedication to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is more than a statement. It is a deep commitment to doing the work to foster an equitable environment that celebrates people for all of who they are.
   

  

 Teradata invites all identities and backgrounds in the workplace. We work with deliberation and intent to ensure we are cultivating collaboration and inclusivity across our global organization. ​ We are proud to be an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, color, ancestry, religion, creed, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, breastfeeding, or related conditions), national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, medical condition, genetic information, gender identity or expression, military and veteran status, or any other legally protected status.

title: Software Engineer - QA
description:
Kennedys is looking for a Software Engineer \\- QA to join the Kennedys IT team in Kerala. The successful candidate will work as part of the Development team based in Kerala.
   

  

 The development team, spread globally with the largest presence being in Kerala and in the UK, are responsible for building and maintaining in\\-house developed solutions, including those under the bracket of Kennedys IQ as well as those developed for and used internally by the LLP.
   

  

 Our QA team facilitate and manage the technical and end user acceptance testing process for new releases, new solutions, and following major upgrades and migrations. This role will report to the Testing Manager and work closely with colleagues across multiple products, solutions, jurisdictions and skillsets.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and execute test cases for functional, integration, regression, and UAT testing.
* Validate new releases, new solutions, upgrades, and migrations.
* Log, track, and verify defects; work closely with developers on resolutions.
* Collaborate with global development teams across Kerala, UK, and other regions.
* Support end‑user acceptance testing and ensure test coverage meets requirements.
* Produce clear test documentation, results, and release readiness reports.
* Follow QA processes, standards, and security/compliance expectations.
* Identify opportunities to improve QA processes and contribute to continuous improvement.


**Essential**
**Required experience**
* Hands‑on experience designing and executing functional, regression, system integration, and UAT test cases.
* Strong background in software testing processes, defect logging, root‑cause analysis, and working with developers to resolve issues.
* Experience testing web applications across multiple browsers/devices (e.g., Edge, Chrome, Safari)
* Familiarity with test documentation (test plans, scripts, results, release sign‑off).
* Experience collaborating with distributed/global development teams.
* Understanding of test environment setup, test data preparation, and configuration management.
* Ability to follow structured QA standards, governance, and security/compliance requirements.


 Desirable
   

  

* Exposure to automation tools or willingness to contribute to automation initiatives.
* Knowledge of API testing, data validation, or integrations.
* Experience working across multiple products or jurisdictions in complex organisations.


 Please let us know if you require any additional support or adjustments to be made in order to submit your application to Kennedys.

title: Software Engineer, AVP

**Basic Qualifications**

title: Software Engineer
description:
Long Description
   

  

**Who We Are**
 AVI\\-SPL is a digital enablement solutions provider who transforms how people and technology connect to elevate experiences, create new value, and enable organizations to thrive and grow. We are the largest provider of collaboration technology solutions, which include our award\\-winning managed services.
   

  

 Our highly certified industry experts and innovation leaders share a vision to help people work smarter and live better. We believe that success starts with a sound team and that an inclusive and diverse workplace moves us all forward.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 As the Software Engineer, you will join AVI\\-SPL Symphony development team and contribute to the development of device and platform integrations – a core component of AVI\\-SPL Symphony ecosystem.
   

  

 This role focuses on designing, building, and maintaining robust integrations with diverse hardware and software systems, including AV devices, monitoring platforms, and communication tools. As part of the integrations team, you will work on real\\-world systems that communicate via both standardized and custom protocols – from RESTful APIs to raw socket streams – ensuring secure and reliable data exchange.
   

  

 We are looking for a curious, hands\\-on engineer who enjoys exploring how systems interact under the hood and is eager to contribute to the growth of our integration ecosystem.
   

  

**Day\\-To\\-Day Responsibilities**
* Design, implement, and maintain device and platform integrations using Java as the primary programming language
* Develop and consume web services using REST, SOAP, and RPC, working with JSON, XML, YAML, and other structured formats
* Implement authorization and authentication mechanisms such as token\\-based, OAuth2, and custom credential flows
* Work with diverse communication protocols, including
+ WebSockets, TCP/UDP sockets, SSH, Telnet
+ Message brokers (e.g., Kafka, MQTT, RabbitMQ)
+ Custom or text\\-based protocols (e.g., proprietary ASCII or socket\\-based protocols)

* Collaborate with other engineers to design modular, scalable, and maintainable system components
* Participate in architectural discussions and contribute to long\\-term technical solutions
* Develop and maintain unit, integration, and end\\-to\\-end tests to ensure system reliability
* Perform operations on Linux platform – including deployment, troubleshooting, and log analysis
* Manage and deploy services using Docker, systemd, and related tooling
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions) and maintain good development practices with Git.


**Must\\-Haves**
**WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (or equivalent)
* 5\\+ years of experience in software development (Java)
* Strong proficiency in Java (Spring Boot or similar frameworks)
* Hands\\-on experience integrating with external APIs, devices, or monitoring systems
* Solid understanding of networking fundamentals and asynchronous communication
* Experience with text\\-based, binary, or custom communication protocols
* Confident using Linux for daily development and troubleshooting tasks
* Familiarity with Git workflows and CI/CD concepts
* Experience with JUnit, Mockito, or other testing frameworks
* Strong English level (both written and spoken)
* Experience working in remote, cross\\-cultural teams
* Ability to work EMEA working hours shift.


**Nice\\-To\\-Haves**
* Experience in Python or Go for scripting or tooling
* Exposure to Docker, systemd, and Linux service orchestration
* Knowledge of OAuth2, JWT, and related authentication mechanisms
* Understanding of software architecture and system design principles
* Experience with message queues, event\\-driven, or streaming systems
* Experience with mocking or simulation tools for testing integration behavior.


**Soft Skills**
* Analytical thinker with strong debugging and problem\\-solving abilities
* Proactive and curious about how systems communicate and interact
* Collaborative mindset with clear communication and documentation skills
* Desire to grow toward architectural ownership and system\\-level thinking.


**WHY YOU’LL LIKE WORKING HERE**
* Medical benefits, including vision
* Paid holidays, sick days, and personal days
* Enjoyable and dynamic company culture
* Training and professional development opportunities


**More About Us**
 AVI\\-SPL is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, protected veteran status, disability status, or membership in any other group protected by federal, state, or local law. AVI\\-SPL is an AA/Disabled/Veteran Protected Employer VEVRAA Federal Contractor.
   

  

 AVI\\-SPL reserves the right to alter work hours and work location as necessary. Work hours may vary based on client requirements and may include travel to various locations in support of the account.

* Perform operations on Linux platform – including deployment, troubleshooting, and log analysis

* Experience with JUnit, Mockito, or other testing frameworks
* Strong English level (both written and spoken)
* Experience working in remote, cross\\-cultural teams

**Nice\\-To\\-Haves**

* Exposure to Docker, systemd, and Linux service orchestration
* Knowledge of OAuth2, JWT, and related authentication mechanisms
* Understanding of software architecture and system design principles

 **GDC** 
 team in our
 **Low\\-Code/No\\-Code Development**

**YOUR TEAM.**

**YOUR ROLE.**

* Hands\\-on experience with AI Builder for predictive analytics and intelligent automation.

 Support team in debugging test bench issues or inconsistencies in results
   

  

 Professional \\& Technical Skills:

 Familiarity with dependency injection, annotations, configuration properties, and Spring test utilities.
   

  

 Practical experience with Spring Framework for building and structuring automation components.
   

  

 Experience in developing test automation and REST API validation using Java.
   

  

 Strong hands\\-on experience in Java (8 or above), with good knowledge of OOP principles, exception handling, multithreading, and collections framework.

 Knowledge of automotive communication protocols or embedded systems testing is a plus.
   

  

 Familiarity with version control tools like Git/ GitLab
   

  

 Strong problem\\-solving and debugging skills.
   

  

 Good verbal and written communication.
   

  

 Ability to work independently and within a collaborative team environment.
   

  

 Attention to detail and ownership of assigned modules.
   

  

 Exposure to ET Framework or other proprietary test frameworks.
   

  

 Understanding of TCU or connected vehicle technologies.
   

  

 Automotive domain experience
   

  

 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in Java Full Stack Development.
* This position is based at our Bengaluru office.
* A Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science or related field is required.

description:
Mavenir is building the future of networks and pioneering advanced technology, focusing on the vision of a single, software\\-based automated network that runs on any cloud. As the industry's only end\\-to\\-end, cloud\\-native network software provider, Mavenir is transforming the way the world connects, accelerating software network transformation for 250\\+ Communications Service Providers in over 120 countries, which serve more than 50% of the world’s subscribers.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer to design, build, and operate modern cloud‑native infrastructure. The role focuses on Kubernetes\\-based deployments, GitOps automation, CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring the reliability, scalability, and security of our products across internal and customer environments
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build, maintain, and evolve Kubernetes environments (on‑prem and cloud).
* Develop and manage Helm charts, ArgoCD applications, and GitOps workflows.
* Automate build, test, and deployment processes within CI/CD pipelines.
* Deploy and configure the product in internal labs, customer labs, and production environments.
* Improve system reliability, performance, and security through automation and best practices.
* Implement and maintain observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, Kibana).
* Collaborate with development teams on architecture, release processes, and operational readiness.
* Participate in Agile ceremonies and contribute to planning and technical decision‑making.
* Identify opportunities for automation, standardization, and process improvements.


**Job Requirements**
* Strong knowledge of Linux systems (RHEL/Ubuntu).
* Hands‑on experience with Kubernetes (deployments, networking, storage, RBAC).
* Practical experience with Helm and ArgoCD or other GitOps tools.
* Scripting skills in Bash and Python.
* Experience with Git, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI.
* Solid understanding of Docker and containerization principles.
* Basic networking knowledge (TCP/IP, DNS, load balancing, ingress).
* Understanding of DevOps, CI/CD, and cloud‑native principles.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* 6\\-8 years of experience in the skills mentioned above


 Good to Have
   

  

* Experience with Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud.
* Knowledge of Terraform, Pulumi, or other Infrastructure‑as‑Code tools.
* Familiarity with distributed systems such as Kafka or RabbitMQ
* Experience with NoSQL databases (Elastic, MongoDB, Cassandra


**Accessibility**
 Mavenir is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodation to individuals with physical and mental disabilities. If you require any assistance, please state in your application or contact your recruiter.
   

  

 Mavenir is an Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) employer and welcomes qualified applicants from around the world, regardless of their ethnicity, gender, religion, nationality, age, disability, or other legally protected status.

title: Senior SDET
description:
**LiveRamp is the data collaboration platform of choice for the world’s most innovative companies. A groundbreaking leader in consumer privacy, data ethics, and foundational identity, LiveRamp is setting the new standard for building a connected customer view with unmatched clarity and context while protecting precious brand and consumer trust. LiveRamp offers complete flexibility to collaborate wherever data lives to support the widest range of data collaboration use cases—within organizations, between brands, and across its premier global network of top\\-quality partners.**
**Hundreds of global innovators, from iconic consumer brands and tech giants to banks, retailers, and healthcare leaders turn to LiveRamp to build enduring brand and business value by deepening customer engagement and loyalty, activating new partnerships, and maximizing the value of their first\\-party data while staying on the forefront of rapidly evolving compliance and privacy requirements.**
* LiveRamp is looking for an experienced Software development engineer in test for the Quality engineering team. The candidate's primary focus will be to integrate closely with the development team and automate the user journey scenarios to enable the process to be as efficient as possible. The primary goal is to support LiveRamp’s product to move fast and not break things.


**Responsibilities**
* Design and develop the product’s release quality assurance flow to fit the organization’s situation.
* Partner with PM to prepare the user case \\& journey of the umbrella product.
* Partner with TPM and dev lead to manage the overall release status through the release management tool.
* Thinking from the user perspective as a product expert to improve the user experience.
* Design and develop product\\-level performance testing.
* Design and develop product\\-level end\\-to\\-end automation to accelerate the product release cycle.
* Prepare and share product knowledge with the SRE and Technical support team.
* Troubleshoot Customer reported Product Issues
* Technical leading small groups of 2\\-3 Software Quality Engineers.


**Minimum Requirements**
 Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science \\+ 5 years in:
   

  

* 5 years of previous experience as an enterprise\\-level Software Developer in a Test role
* 5 years of Hands\\-on experience in Test Strategy, Test Plan, Design, and Execution for enterprise\\-level Functional, Integration, and PSR testing
* 5 years of Hands\\-on experience on Robustness testing tools like Jmeter
* 5 years of Hands\\-on developer skills in any of the programming languages: Python, Java
* 2 years of Hands\\-on experience in setting up cloud test environments using Google Cloud


 Platform, Amazon Web Services, etc.
   

  

* 3 years of Hands\\-on Work experience in agile and as an integrated Quality Engineer in the scrum Team


**Plus Requirements**
* 2\\+ years of software engineer background on the front end or back end will be great.
* 2\\+ years of previous experience as a tech lead to organize testing around microservices and UI.


**Benefits**
* Flexible paid time off, paid holidays, options for working from home, and paid parental leave.
* Comprehensive Benefits Package: LiveRamp offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to help you be your best self in your personal and professional lives. Our benefits package offers medical, dental, vision, accident, life and disability, an employee assistance program, voluntary benefits as well as perks programs for your healthy lifestyle, career growth, and more. Your medical benefits extend to your dependents including parents.


**More About Us**
*LiveRamp’s mission is to connect data in ways that matter, and doing so starts with our people. We know that inspired teams enlist people from a blend of backgrounds and experiences. And we know that individuals do their best when they not only bring their full selves to work but feel like they truly belong. Connecting LiveRampers to new ideas and one another is one of our guiding principles—one that informs how we hire, train, and grow our global team across nine countries and four continents. Click* 
*here* 
*to learn more about Diversity, Inclusion, \\& Belonging (DIB) at LiveRamp.*
 We use automated decision systems (ADS) as part of our recruitment and hiring process. If you require an accommodation or believe that the use of an ADS may create a barrier to your application or participation in the hiring process due to a disability or other protected characteristic, please let us know. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations and ensuring an equitable hiring experience for all candidates.
   

  

**To all recruitment agencies** 
 : LiveRamp does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, LiveRamp employees or any other company location. LiveRamp is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

title: Staff Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
TeamViewer provides a leading Digital Workplace platform that connects people with technology—enabling, improving and automating digital processes to make work work better. Our software solutions harness the power of AI and shape the future of digitalization.
   

  

 We believe that our diverse teams and strong company culture are key to the success of our products and technologies, that hundreds of millions of users around the world and around 645,000 customers across all industries rely on. With more than 1,900 employees worldwide, we celebrate the unique perspectives and talents that each individual brings to the table and foster a dynamic work environment where new ideas thrive. Are you ready to join our team and make an impact?
   

  

 The TeamViewer ONE platform is focused on small and medium businesses and finds and resolves IT issues before they affect users. Over the past several years we have successfully built and released products which makes IT administrators' day\\-to\\-day life easier. Our vision is to become THE autonomous endpoint management solution for our customers.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 We’re looking for a Staff Software Engineer to play a key role in supporting and enhancing our TeamViewer ONE capabilities, trusted by small and medium business customers. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining and improving the experience for our existing customers, while helping evolve our User Experience and SaaS cloud platform. You will also bring in expertise in using technologies \\- like React, Typescript, Javascript, CSS, Open API, Redux, Webpack.
   

  

 As part of an agile team, you’ll contribute as an individual contributor, working primarily with Typescript, react to enhance our product TeamViewer ONE, which will run as containerized services on Kubernetes. You will be expected to guide and mentor other team members.
   

  

* Build services for our TeamViewer ONE solution, by enabling the platform and clients, to derive insights
* Design and develop new functionality and components for our software using coding languages but not limited to JavaScript, React, Typescript, CSS3
* Collaborate with front\\-end engineers, backend engineers and quality assurance engineers to design optimum solutions, balancing performance, costs and long\\-term maintainability
* Continuously integrate, build and deploy our solution from test system to production
* Design, implement and consume common APIs based on architecture guidelines and frameworks
* Design UI\\-components and autogenerate them based on defined schemes
* Design and build usage behavior events into our frontend
* Create UI test cases with cypress testing framework
* Optimize and enhance our software with new, efficient algorithms and state\\-of\\-the\\-art software tools and technologies
* Work independently on solutions for specified requirements and be responsible for complying with time and quality specifications
* Ensure that our software is secure, stable, scalable and runs efficiently
* Monitor the latest technical developments in your field and make proposals for improvement
* Guide and assist other team members in engineering topics relevant for the team
* Coach \\& mentor other members in the team
* Act as an advisor for product managers (feasibility studies and time estimates for new functionality to be implemented)
* Communicate with customers to analyze \\& fix product defects and during major implementations


**Requirements**
* A university or college degree in the field of information technology, computer science or a related subject or relevant work experience
* 9\\+ years of professional experience in the field of software development
* Solid knowledge of Typescript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS is mandatory
* Solid knowledge of JavaScript frameworks and tools like React, Redux, Webpack, etc.
* Strong focus on accessibility and performance, with the ability to validate that solutions operate efficiently under increasing workloads and as a distributed system
* Must have experience in any of the unit test frameworks
* Experience in cypress UI test framework
* Experience in Java, C\\# or C\\+\\+ is a plus
* Experience in Kubernetes, Docker, Kafka, Argo CD, Azure/AWS/GCP services (like AKS, Redis, Key Vault, Event Hub, Service Bus, SQL MI, etc.) is a plus
* Experience in taking architectural decisions about the development and maintenance of large\\-scale distributed systems and integrations with applications and user interfaces
* Understanding of Clean Code and Design Patterns for object\\-orientated programming
* Familiarity with AI tools for coding (like Github Co\\-pilot or Cursor) is a plus
* Familiarity with concepts of end\\-user\\-computing, log analysis, anomaly detection \\& correlation is a plus
* A positive and solution\\-oriented mindset paired with a structured and analytical way of thinking/working, being a team player, as well as motivated to learn new things
* Fluency in English is mandatory, further languages like Portuguese are a plus


 TeamViewer is an equal opportunities employer and is committed to building an inclusive culture where everyone feels welcome and supported. We C\\-A\\-R\\-E and understand that our diverse, values\\-driven culture makes us stronger. As we continue to grow as a company, we also focus on enabling our employees to grow both personally and professionally. We are proud to have an open and embracing workplace environment that will empower you to be your best no matter your gender, civil or family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, education level, or race.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**Experience** 
 : 5\\.00 \\+ years
   

  

**Salary** 
 : Confidential (based on experience)
   

  

**Expected Notice Period** 
 : 15 Days
   

  

**Shift** 
 : (GMT\\+05:30\\) Asia/Kolkata (IST)
   

  

**Opportunity Type** 
 : Hybrid ()
   

  

**Placement Type** 
 : Full Time Permanent position(Payroll and Compliance to be managed by: Z1\\)
   

  

**(\\*Note: This is a requirement for one of Uplers' client \\- Z1\\)
   

  

**What do you need for this opportunity?
   

  

**Must have skills required:**
 Ledger design experience (double\\-entry or event\\-sourced patterns)., Secrets Management, Strong SQL and relational DB skills, Python Programming, Node.js/TypeScript, Java/Kotlin, Banking/fintech, Postgres
   

  

**Z1 is Looking for:******
**Role** 
 : Senior Backend Engineer
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hybrid: Bengaluru (3 times a week)
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Fulltime Permanent on Direct Client Payroll
   

  

**Shift Timings:** 
 10am to 7 pm IST
   

  

**Rounds of Interview:** 
 3 rounds
   

  

**About Zeroto1:**
 Zeroto1 builds and ships production\\-grade software for fintech and consumer internet companies—especially systems that sit at the intersection of money\\-adjacent workflows, external integrations, and high reliability expectations. We operate like a product engineering team: tight ownership, strong quality bar, and delivery that holds up in production.
   

  

**The role**
 We’re looking for a Senior Backend Engineer with strong fintech instincts to design and build backend systems that require correctness, auditability, idempotency, and operational clarity. This role is ideal for someone who has built payments/rewards/ledger/reconciliation style platforms and cares deeply about the edge cases.
   

  

**What You’ll Build**
 You’ll work on backend services that typically involve:
   

  

* Orchestrating transactional workflows across multiple external systems (e.g., banks, payment rails, partner APIs, marketplaces).
* Designing state machines with idempotent operations (safe under retries, timeouts, duplicates).
* Building Postgres\\-first systems with strong schema design, constraints, migrations, and indexes.
* Implementing webhooks securely (signature validation, replay protection, dedupe) and polling fallbacks when needed.
* Building background processing with retries/backoff, dead\\-letter semantics, and reconciliation.
* Shipping systems with strong observability: structured logs, correlation IDs, metrics, and actionable dashboards.


**Core principles (fintech\\-grade engineering)**
* Correctness over cleverness: deterministic state transitions; no ambiguous outcomes.
* Idempotency everywhere: client retries, webhooks, jobs, and integration calls must not cause duplicate effects.
* ACID \\+ consistency: clear transactional boundaries and integrity constraints.
* Auditability: ability to reconstruct “what happened” for any transaction.
* Resilience: graceful handling of partial failures and third\\-party instability.
* Operational excellence: systems designed to be debugged quickly under real incidents.


**Responsibilities**
* Design and implement backend APIs and domain services for transactional workflows.
* Define data models and write migrations with correctness and performance in mind.
* Integrate with external systems (banks/partners/vendors) with robust error handling and retry semantics.
* Implement webhook ingestion \\+ deduping \\+ processing pipelines.
* Build background workers/queues and reconciliation jobs (DB queue, SQS/Kafka, etc.).
* Add observability (metrics, logs, traces) and write runbooks for common failure modes.
* Write high\\-signal tests: unit tests, integration tests, and contract tests where feasible.
* Participate in design reviews and raise the engineering bar through strong code reviews.


**Required Experience**
* 5\\+ years building backend systems in production.
* Strong fintech / payments domain exposure: payments, rewards, wallet systems, billing, settlement, reconciliation, chargebacks, partner integrations, or similar.
* Deep understanding of:


 ○ ACID transactions, locking, isolation levels, consistency tradeoffs
   

  

 ○ Idempotency patterns and exactly\\-once effect design
   

  

 ○ Distributed failure modes (timeouts, retries, partial failure recovery)
   

  

* Strong SQL and relational DB skills, ideally Postgres:


 ○ schema design, constraints, indexing, query performance, migrations
   

  

* Experience building secure webhook systems and background job processing.
* Strong attention to detail and a high ownership mindset.


**Nice to have**
* Ledger design experience (double\\-entry or event\\-sourced patterns).
* Familiarity with security/compliance basics (PII handling, secrets management, least privilege).
* Experience with OpenTelemetry/Datadog/New Relic, or similar observability stacks.
* Experience operating services in AWS/GCP/Azure with CI/CD.


**Tech stack**
 We’re flexible on language/framework. You should be strong in at least one of:
   

  

* Python (FastAPI) \\- Preferably
* Node.js/TypeScript (Fastify/Nest/Express)
* Java/Kotlin (Spring)


 A “Postgres\\-first, correctness\\-first” mindset matters more than framework preference.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like**
* You ship robust transactional workflows that are safe under retries and partial failures.
* You build systems that are diagnosable in production (not just working in dev).
* You proactively identify edge cases, close gaps with tests, and improve reliability through design.


**How to apply for this opportunity?**
* Step 1: Click On Apply! And Register or Login on our portal.
* Step 2: Complete the Screening Form \\& Upload updated Resume
* Step 3: Increase your chances to get shortlisted \\& meet the client for the Interview!


**About Uplers:**
 Our goal is to make hiring reliable, simple, and fast. Our role will be to help all our talents find and apply for relevant contractual onsite opportunities and progress in their career. We will support any grievances or challenges you may face during the engagement.
   

  

 (Note: There are many more opportunities apart from this on the portal. Depending on the assessments you clear, you can apply for them as well).
   

  

 So, if you are ready for a new challenge, a great work environment, and an opportunity to take your career to the next level, don't hesitate to apply today. We are waiting for you!

title: Lead Consultant - Veeva Vault (RIM & QMS) Senior Configuration Engineer
description:
**Job Title: Lead Consultant \\- Veeva Vault (RIM \\& QMS) Senior Configuration Engineer**
**Career Level: E**
**Introduction to role**
 Are you ready to lead enterprise\\-scale Veeva Vault solutions that help accelerate how safe, effective medicines reach patients? In this role, you will guide how our regulatory and quality platforms evolve, ensuring they are secure, efficient and fit for purpose. Your work will translate complex needs into robust configurations and integrations that enable speed, compliance and confidence across the business.
   

  

 As our senior configuration specialist and consultant, you will set direction while staying hands\\-on, shaping the roadmap for RIM and QMS and delivering high\\-quality releases. You will partner with global stakeholders and supplier teams to remove friction, automate where it matters and drive consistent standards across multiple Vault estates. Do you thrive on turning complex requirements into elegant, secure solutions that scale?
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Technical Leadership and Consulting: Serve as a senior configuration specialist and Veeva Vault expert for partners across regions and business areas, advising on best practices and ensuring alignment to strategy.
* Requirements and Design Stewardship: Lead requirement gathering, feasibility checks and design reviews with business and IT stakeholders as part of a scrum team; act as a gatekeeper for design alignment and standards.
* Release Delivery Excellence: Drive Design, Build, Test and Deploy activities for regular planned releases and key platform initiatives, meeting commitments on quality, timelines and compliance.
* Vault Extension Engineering: Design and build Veeva Vault extensions to support custom business flows that address real pain points and improve throughput.
* Automation and Problem Solving: Identify and solve business pain points with a focus on automation opportunities that reduce manual effort and error.
* RIM and QMS Roadmap Leadership: Own and advance the delivery roadmap for RIM and QMS, working closely with supplier teams and business governance groups.
* Security and Controls: Ensure all system security and control procedures are implemented, maintained and continuously improved.
* Integration Simplification: Generate and implement ideas to simplify and streamline the integration landscape in line with established integration designs and patterns.
